ViewerSession.title: Viewer Session
ViewerSession.description: Represents a WebRTC signaling session between a broadcaster and a specific viewer.

viewerId.description: Unique identifier of the viewer device

state.description: Current signaling state: request_offer, offer_sent, answer_sent, closed

offer.description: SDP Offer generated by the broadcaster

answer.description: SDP Answer generated by the viewer

IceCandidate.title: ICE Candidate
IceCandidate.description: An ICE candidate exchanged between broadcaster and viewer.

sender.description: The sender role: broadcaster or viewer

/streams/{streamId}/viewers/{viewerId}.description: Collection of signaling sessions for a stream.

/streams/{streamId}/viewers/{viewerId}/c.description: ICE candidates for a specific signaling session.
